label: Early endothelial cells
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'Early endothelial cells' as a fine-grained endothelial cell annotation in prenatal skin. Trajectory analysis shows these cells as the root population from which both arteriolar (capillaries, capillary arterioles, arterioles) and venular (postcapillary venules, venules) lineages differentiate (Fig. 4d, Extended Data Fig. 10a-c). They represent the earliest/progenitor endothelial state in the fetal skin vascular tree.
